en.text: A female slave, whose husband is a slave, has the option to keep him or leave him (when she is manumitted).

ar.text: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ، حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، وَهَمَّامٌ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ رَأَيْتُهُ عَبْدًا يَعْنِي زَوْجَ بَرِيرَةَ‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton Ibën Abasi: E kam parë atë si skllav, d.m.th. bashkëshortin e Berires.

en.text: I saw him as a slave, (namely, Barira's husband).
